limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or capacity figures tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; the Google Cloud facility is described qualitatively only, preventing a score above 3 for investment intensity.

Risk disclosure is detailed and company-specific with named mechanisms (fraud, IP infringement, regulatory compliance costs, reputational harm) but no quantified risk exposure or named governance/oversight body was cited, preventing a score of 5.
